blurb: ARIA's Safeguarded AI programme (within Mathematics for Safe AI), building an open-source assurance toolkit so AI agents can produce formally verified, fail-safe artefacts.

hiring.note: ARIA Pinpoint board refreshed 2026-07-13. Two new London Legal Counsel roles (Senior + junior). 'AI for Chemistry (Olfactory Perception)' delisted since 2026-07-02.

publications.title: HASH – making AI legible in the real world
publications.summary: ARIA interview with Creator team HASH (Dei Vilkinsons, Ciaran Morinan) working across the Safeguarded AI programme — applying their knowledge-graph platform to safety-critical biopharma supply chains and building the trust interfaces that make mathematically grounded AI systems usable by non-technical domain experts.

publications.title: Empowering the next wave of AI-powered science
publications.summary: ARIA insight on the Encode Fellowship (run with Pillar VC) placing top AI researchers into UK academic labs to accelerate science.

publications.title: Moving Targets in AI
publications.summary: Programme Director reflects on evolving benchmarks within ARIA's Scaling Compute programme and a new AI hardware benchmarking funding call.

roles.title: Senior Legal Counsel
roles.note: ARIA policy-facing legal role — direct fit for Aadi. First at their level.

roles.title: Science and Technology Lead - Next-Generation Compute Architectures
Science and Technology Lead - Multi-Agent Security
Technical and Translational Lead - Safeguarded AI (Cybersecurity)

news.title: An update on the Safeguarded AI pivot
news.summary: ARIA programme directors Nora and davidad sit down with CEO Kathleen Fisher to reflect on the Safeguarded AI programme's progress under davidad's leadership and its pivot to the next phase — a status update on the UK's flagship 'mathematics for safe AI' bet. Month-level date (February 2026) from ARIA's own page.

notes:
Safeguarded AI programme page (now under /opportunity-spaces/mathematics-for-safe-ai/safeguarded-ai) confirms £59m programme, updated thesis as of May 2026; programme thesis PDFs and SAILS report are PDFs not dated HTML pages. Publications drawn from ARIA's own /insights pages with real publication dates shown on-page. No controversies where ARIA is a named legal party. role_harvest 2026-07-02: Pinpoint JSON verified four London ARIA roles directly tied to AI/security/compute programme delivery.

[role_harvest 2026-07-13] Two new London Legal Counsel roles added (Senior Legal Counsel + Legal Counsel). ARIA legal team scaling from 0→2 legal counsel = policy-relevant hiring signal, direct fit for Aadi. 'AI for Chemistry (Olfactory Perception)' delisted since 2026-07-02.
